title: chelone lyonii
intro: Chelone lyonii, also known as Lyon's turtlehead, is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chelone lyonii include its ability to reduce congestion, relieve sinus pressure, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy. Chelone lyonii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be utilized for its medicinal benefits.
